subject: Fwd: Professional opportunity
plainBody:
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Ana Recruiter <ana@talent.example>
Subject: DevOps Engineer opportunity at Nube Corp
Position: DevOps Engineer
Company: Nube Corp
Location: Colombia - Remote
Salary: USD 2500 - 3200 monthly
We need Linux, Kubernetes, CI/CD and Terraform experience.
Apply: https://careers.nube.example/jobs/devops-778?ref=recruiter
